name: Specialist Agent
tagline: Your AI development team — 25+ specialized agents
description: Build, review, debug, and ship production code faster. Supports Vue, React, Next.js, and SvelteKit with framework-specific patterns.

pricing.details: MIT Licensed - Free and open source

features.title: Framework Support
features.description: Vue 3, React, Next.js, SvelteKit with architecture patterns

features.title: Full & Lite Modes
features.description: Sonnet/Opus for complex tasks, Haiku for quick tasks (60-80% cheaper)

features.title: TDD Enforcer
features.description: @tdd blocks code without failing tests first

features.title: Unified Code Review
features.description: @reviewer checks spec, quality, and architecture in one pass

features.title: Checkpoint & Rollback
features.description: Git checkpoints after tasks, easy rollback
